text: Compression garments provide small but statistically significant benefits for recovery of strength, power, and endurance performance following exercise.
population: healthy athletes and physically active individuals

text: Compression garments are most effective for strength recovery, with large benefits observed at 2-8 hours and beyond 24 hours post-exercise.
population: healthy athletes and physically active individuals

text: Compression garments most effectively enhance recovery from resistance exercise, with the largest benefits at time points beyond 24 hours.
population: healthy athletes and physically active individuals

text: Compression garments can enhance next-day cycling performance, with large benefits at 24 hours post-exercise.
population: healthy athletes and physically active individuals

text: The recovery benefits of compression garments are not significantly influenced by the applied pressure level (below vs. above 15 mmHg).
population: healthy athletes and physically active individuals

text: The recovery benefits of compression garments are not significantly influenced by participant training status (trained vs. untrained).
population: healthy athletes and physically active individuals

text: Compression garments provide greater recovery benefits for strength outcomes than for power or endurance outcomes.
specific_value: strength ES = 0.62 (95% CI 0.39, 0.84) vs. overall ES = 0.38
population: healthy athletes and physically active individuals
